decisions_log.rationale: Stub category: test → light. Single-phase triage + targeted fix.

decisions_log.finding: 30 'failures' are describe.skip blocks (known-gap, all pre-existing). 1 flaky test: scanner-export > should support recursive option (ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND parallel worker race).

2 additional flaky tests discovered: scanner-standalone > should cache results for performance (timing assertion fragile under parallel load); saveIndex > should create index.json file (shared .test-project dir deleted by concurrent afterEach). Fixed: timing assertion replaced with cache stats check; saveIndex dir made unique per test via randomUUID.

phase_transitions.outcome: All tasks complete. 5 files modified. Suite: 1540 passed | 30 skipped | 0 failed. 3/3 runs stable.

plan_adjustments.reason: Full suite run revealed 2 additional flaky tests not in original triage. Both were parallel-runner isolation failures. Fixed within scope of this workorder.
